body.title: Granny: dispatch CC.0 via tmux send-keys with semaphore + usage gate
body.result: cc0_dispatch_fn via tmux send-keys; gated on semaphore + usage + in_progress; protected by config-driven rules from granny.yaml
body.description:
When CC.0 is available, Granny offers it a sprint ticket via tmux send-keys to the running claude-main session — not by spawning a new process.

Dispatch command: tmux send-keys -t claude-main '/sprint-ticket T-xxx' ENTER

Gate check order: (1) CC.0.available.false absent, (2) CC.0.available.true present, (3) Claude usage < usage_max_pct (default 70%), (4) no worker=claude ticket in status=in_progress.

Channel post on offer: GRANNY_CC0_OFFER|ticket=T-xxx|session=claude-main
CC.0 accepts by marking ticket in_progress; declines by posting CC0_DECLINE|ticket=T-xxx|reason=... to channel (ticket stays in sprint).
Time window (default 21:00-06:00 local) and away semaphore are both gates in granny.yaml — config-driven, not hardcoded.

HIGH-INERTIA: Touches devices/granny/daemon.py — this file caused the 2026-06-01 CC runaway.
AKIEN APPROVED INLINE 2026-06-02: Design is send-keys to existing session (not subprocess.Popen/spawn). Protected by non-bypassable semaphore interlock (CC.0.available.true) + usage gate. One ticket at a time (max_concurrent: 1). Fundamentally different from the spawn pattern that caused the runaway.

**Affected files:** devices/granny/dispatch.py (add cc0_dispatch_fn), devices/granny/daemon.py (wire cc0 dispatch branch), config/profiles/granny.yaml (CC.0 worker entry)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; no subprocess.Popen for CC dispatch — send-keys ONLY; semaphore interlock is non-bypassable; log dispatch attempt at INFO with gate values
**Scope boundary:** IN: CC.0 offer via tmux send-keys; semaphore + usage + in_progress gate checks; accept/decline channel events. OUT: spawning new CC processes (prohibited), CC.x workers, DickSimnel dispatch.
**Completion criteria:** With CC.0.available.true present and usage < 70%, Granny posts GRANNY_CC0_OFFER and sends /sprint-ticket T-xxx to claude-main; with CC.0.available.false present, no offer made regardless of time or usage; with a worker=claude in_progress ticket, no offer made; tests covering each gate state.
